description: Style Note Tonga's summer collection features head-turning designs - fashion-forward yet classic, this piece will stay in vogue up to the next season. Tap into summer's aesthetic effortlessly while chanelling the runway's hottest trends. Style this with a tapering pair of denims (we recommend a wedge heel for the spring) for maximum effect.Product Details Black stretchy top, has a round neck, lace detail in white all around the neckline, short sleeves with ruffled elastication detail along the sleevesMaterial and Care 95% rayon, 5% spandexHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
